preferred_name: Ratio radiation thermometer with filter wheel

preferred_name_ml.en: Ratio radiation thermometer with filter wheel

definition: ratio radiation thermometer with a single detector in which the radiation is interrupted periodically by a modulator with two filters

definition_ml.en: ratio radiation thermometer with a single detector in which the radiation is interrupted periodically by a modulator with two filters
definition_ml.de: Verhältnis-Strahlungsthermometer mit einem Einzeldetektor, in dem die Strahlung periodisch mit einem Modulator mit zwei Filtern unterbrochen wird
